injuries.comment: The Penguins said on Friday (Sept. 19) that Hayes will miss the start of the regular season and will be re-evaluated in a month.

The Penguins said on Wednesday (Sept. 10) that Zonnon will miss the Prospect Challenge due to an undisclosed injury, per Michelle Crechiolo of the Penguins' official site. There's expected to be an update on Zonnon's status before training camp.
The Penguins said on Thursday (Sept. 18) that McGroarty is out indefinitely with an upper-body injury.
